title: Solving a First Order Linear Recurrence Relation
description: A step-by-step flowchart outlining the process to find a closed-form solution for a recurrence relation of the form aₙ = c * aₙ₋₁ + f(n).
elements: Define Recurrence: aₙ = c * aₙ₋₁ + f(n)
Identify Homogeneous Part: aₙ = c * aₙ₋₁
Find Homogeneous Solution: aₙ⁽ʰ⁾ = A * cⁿ
Find Particular Solution: aₙ⁽ᵖ⁾ (form depends on f(n))
Construct General Solution: aₙ = aₙ⁽ʰ⁾ + aₙ⁽ᵖ⁾
relationships: Process starts by defining the recurrence
Homogeneous part is identified and solved for its general solution
A particular solution is found based on the non-homogeneous term f(n)
General solution is the sum of homogeneous and particular solutions
Initial condition is used to solve for the constant in the general solution
Process concludes with a final, closed-form formula
